workflow.name: CockroachDB HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate CockroachDB HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare CockroachDB inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/cockroachdb-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[cockroachdb]
10.31.87.11 role=cockroach name=cockroachdb-01
10.31.87.12 role=cockroach name=cockroachdb-02
10.31.87.13 role=cockroach name=cockroachdb-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install CockroachDB container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/cockroachdb-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: cockroachdb
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/cockroachdb-inventory.ini /tmp/cockroachdb-runtime.yml

data.label: Render CockroachDB cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/cockroachdb-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: cockroachdb
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/cockroachdb
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/cockroachdb/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            cockroachdb:
              image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.2.0
              container_name: octastack-cockroachdb
              restart: unless-stopped
              command: "start-single-node --insecure --store=/cockroach/cockroach-data"
              ports:
                - "26257:26257"
                - "8080:8080"
              volumes:
                - data:/cockroach/cockroach-data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy CockroachDB cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/cockroachdb-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/cockroachdb/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/cockroachdb/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/cockroachdb/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/cockroachdb-inventory.ini /tmp/cockroachdb-deploy.yml

data.label: Document CockroachDB topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/cockroachdb-topology.md <<'EOF'
# CockroachDB HA topology

Members:
- cockroachdb-01: 10.31.87.11 (cockroach)
- cockroachdb-02: 10.31.87.12 (cockroach)
- cockroachdb-03: 10.31.87.13 (cockroach)

This example deploys one CockroachDB container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/cockroachdb-topology.md

data.label: Validate CockroachDB cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/cockroachdb-inventory.ini cockroachdb -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
